scripts.name: Color Palette Generator
scripts.description: Extract fills, strokes, gradients into organized swatches with RGB, CMYK, HSL, HEX values
scripts.author: nodeus

scripts.name: Hanging Chars and Prepositions
scripts.description: Fix orphaned characters and prepositions with non-breaking spaces for Russian and English
scripts.author: nodeus

scripts.name: Chart Builder
scripts.description: Build line, bar, and donut charts from numeric data. 32-color palette, per-diagram legends, sharp bar corners, configurable axes/grid. Supports data without series names, error popups.
scripts.author: nodeus
